mapper.select: SELECT id, meeting_id, section_type, sort_order, content, work_request_no FROM hkgn.daily_meeting_note WHERE meeting_id = #{meetingId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.update: UPDATE hkgn.daily_meeting_note SET content = #{content}, section_type = #{sectionType}, work_request_no = #{workRequestNo}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
